title: API returns 500 instead of 404 on unknown route
description: Hitting GET /api/unknown returns a 500 with stack trace in the body. Should return a clean 404 with JSON error envelope.

title: Settings dropdown overlaps profile menu in dark mode
description: On the account page, opening the settings dropdown causes it to overlap the profile menu when dark mode is active. Light mode renders correctly.

title: Please add CSV export to the orders page
description: It would be great if the orders page had an Export to CSV button next to the filter bar. Right now we copy rows by hand into a spreadsheet.

title: All checkout attempts fail with 'card declined' even on valid cards
description: Since this morning every checkout returns 'card declined' from the gateway. Test cards from the gateway sandbox also fail. Revenue is currently zero.

title: Tooltip on the help icon has a typo ('recieve' -> 'receive')
description: The tooltip on the (?) icon in the billing section says 'recieve invoices'. Should be 'receive'. Cosmetic only.

title: Webhook signature verification accepts forged payloads
description: verify_webhook returns True for payloads signed with an empty secret. An attacker can submit fake refund webhooks and trigger refunds without auth.

title: Password reset emails sometimes never arrive
description: About 1 in 10 password reset requests never deliver an email. Users are blocked from logging in until a support agent issues a manual reset.

title: Pull-to-refresh gesture stutters on Android 14 devices
description: On Pixel 8 / Android 14 the pull-to-refresh animation drops frames and the spinner judders. Functionality still works.

title: Empty-state illustration is misaligned by 2px on large screens
description: On 1440p+ displays the illustration on the empty inbox screen sits 2 pixels too far left. Hard to notice unless overlaid with the design comp.

title: Search endpoint p95 latency jumped from 200ms to 1800ms
description: Since the index rebuild last night, /api/search p95 has climbed to ~1.8s. Users are complaining the search 'feels broken'. CPU on search nodes is steady.

title: Login page crashes on mobile Safari iOS 17
description: Tapping the Login button on Safari iOS 17 immediately crashes the tab. The login flow works on Chrome iOS and on desktop Safari.

title: query() leaks connections back to the pool when execute raises
description: If conn.execute raises inside query(), the connection is still pushed back into the pool via the finally block, but it stays marked closed. Pool fills with dead connections.

title: reset_password does not invalidate active sessions on other devices
description: After calling reset_password, sessions issued before the reset remain valid on other devices. Expected: all live tokens for that user are revoked.

title: begin_transaction context manager swallows rollback errors silently
description: When rollback itself raises, the original exception is masked and the transaction state is left as in_transaction=True. Subsequent queries on the connection misbehave.

title: validate_session never expires tokens issued more than 8 hours ago
description: validate_session uses a stale comparison and returns True for tokens past their SESSION_TTL window. Logged-in users effectively have an infinite session.

title: Refund endpoint chargeable without authentication
description: POST /api/refund processes refunds without checking auth_middleware. Anyone with a transaction id can issue refunds. Actively being abused.

title: Mobile app cold start takes 12+ seconds on mid-range Android devices
description: Cold start time on Samsung A-series and similar mid-range Android devices is 12-15 seconds. Users churn on first launch. Newer flagship devices are unaffected.

title: Reports page query takes 30s+ for accounts with >10k orders
description: The reports dashboard issues a single unindexed query that scans the orders table. For large accounts it times out. Smaller accounts are fine.

title: API rate limiter can be bypassed by varying the X-Forwarded-For header
description: The rate limiter keys on X-Forwarded-For without validating the upstream proxy. Sending random IPs in that header bypasses the per-IP cap.

title: Splash screen logo is blurry on iPad Pro 11" portrait
description: On iPad Pro 11-inch in portrait orientation the splash logo appears blurry. Other orientations and devices render it crisply.
